Package index

Setup

set_cibersort_binary()
Register the Path to the CIBERSORT Script
set_cibersort_mat()
Register the Path to the CIBERSORT Signature Matrix

Preprocessing

subsetSCE()
Subset a SingleCellExperiment by Cell Type
subsetSPE()
Subset a SpatialExperiment by Spatial Coordinates

Main Workflow

deconvolution_methods
Supported Deconvolution Methods
preprocess()
Preprocess Single Cell and Spatial Data for spacedeconv
normalize()
Normalize Expression Data in SCE/SPE Objects
build_model()
Build a Reference Signature
deconvolute()
Deconvolution with spacedeconv
build_and_deconvolute()
Build Model and Deconvolute in One Step
available_results()
List Available Deconvolution Results in a SpatialExperiment

Custom access to methods

build_model_card()
No Signature for CARD
build_model_cell2location()
Build a cell2location Model
build_model_dot()
No Signature for DOT
build_model_immunedeconv()
No Signature for Immunedeconv
build_model_rctd()
No Signature for RCTD
build_model_spatial_dwls()
Build a SpatialDWLS Signature
build_model_spotlight()
Build a SPOTlight Model
deconvolute_card()
Deconvolute with CARD
deconvolute_cell2location()
Deconvolute with cell2location
deconvolute_dot()
Deconvolute with DOT
deconvolute_immunedeconv()
Deconvolute with immunedeconv
deconvolute_immunedeconv_mouse()
Deconvolute with immunedeconv (mouse)
deconvolute_rctd()
Deconvolute with RCTD
deconvolute_spatial_dwls()
Deconvolute with SpatialDWLS
deconvolute_spotlight()
Deconvolute with SPOTlight

Visualization

plot_gene()
Plot Gene Expression
plot_spatial()
Plot Spatial Results
plot_celltype()
Plot Cell Types (Deprecated)
plot_umi_count()
Plot UMI Counts
plot_ndetected_genes()
Plot Detected Genes per Spot
plot_most_abundant()
Plot Most Abundant Cell Type per Spot
plot_comparison()
Plot Cell Type Comparison
plot_scatter()
Compare Two Result Columns with a Scatterplot
plot_overview()
Plot Overview of a SpatialExperiment

Sample Data

single_cell_data_1
Example single-cell dataset 1 (Wu et al.)
single_cell_data_2
Example single-cell dataset 2 (Wu et al.)

Example single-cell dataset 4 (Wu et al.)

Example spatial dataset 1 (Wu et al.)

Example spatial dataset 2 (Wu et al.)
spatial_data_3
Example spatial dataset 3 (Wu et al.)
spatial_data_4
Example spatial dataset 4 (Wu et al.)

Utils

aggregate_results()
Aggregate Deconvolution Results
annotate_spots()
Annotate Specific Spots in a SpatialExperiment
addCustomAnnotation()
Add a Custom Annotation Column
cluster()
Cluster SpatialExperiment Results
get_cluster_features()
Get Cluster Features
print_info()
Print Dataset Summary
filter_sample_id()
Filter by Sample ID
compare_signatures()
Compare Signatures
convert_human_to_mouse()
Map Human to Mouse Gene Symbols
convert_mouse_to_human()
Map Mouse to Human Gene Symbols
spatialcorr()
Create a Correlation Plot
get_lr()
Compute Ligand-Receptor Scores per Spot
gene_set_score()
Calculate Gene Set Score
scale_cell_counts()
Scale Relative Cell Fractions to Absolute Counts
corr_expr()
Correlation Heatmap of Signature Matrix

DecoupleR

get_decoupleR_reference()
Fetch decoupleR Reference Networks
compute_activities()
Compute Pathway and Transcription Factor Activities with decoupleR
